title: IdeaForge Component Registry
description: Machine-readable registry of all agents and skills. Auto-generated from component frontmatter. Lists capabilities, inputs, outputs, dependencies, and metadata. State machine is defined in harness/pipeline.json (single source of truth).

agents.name: idea-capturer-1
agents.description: Captures a raw idea and turns it into a structured project spec
post_conditions: memory/ideas_store.json contains new idea with stage=structured

agents.name: idea-explorer-2
agents.description: Explores 10 directions for an idea, picks top 3, lets user choose

agents.name: strategist-3
agents.description: Stress-tests a structured idea across 4 dimensions and decides if it's ready to build
pre_conditions: memory/ideas_store.json contains idea with direction chosen

agents.name: researcher-4
agents.description: Researches competitors, market signals, and validation before the PRD
post_conditions: docs/PRODUCT_SENSE.md updated with market research findings

agents.name: prd-writer-5
agents.description: Turns a structured idea + review into a buildable PRD
post_conditions: docs/product-specs/index.md updated with MVP spec entry

agents.name: arch-writer-6
agents.description: Reads the PRD and designs the system architecture

agents.name: plan-writer-7
agents.description: Breaks PRD + Architecture into a phased, realistic build plan

agents.name: build-orchestrator-8
agents.description: Creates GitHub repo and pushes all planning docs + conductor system

agents.name: project-manager
agents.description: Captures key decisions incrementally after each pipeline stage
post_conditions: docs/design-docs/ contains individual decision documents for each major choice

skills.name: ask-questions
skills.description: Generates 5–7 clarifying questions to understand what the user is talking about

skills.name: clarify-before-write
skills.description: Asks clarifying questions before writing docs to ensure alignment with user intent

skills.name: create-idea-storage-folder
skills.description: Creates the idea_storage/{slug}-{timestamp}/ folder structure for exploration artifacts

skills.name: elaborate
skills.description: Expands a brief idea concept into fuller detail across multiple angles

skills.name: explore-directions
skills.description: Generates 10 potential directions, filters to top 3, and presents for user selection

skills.name: load-idea
skills.description: Loads an idea from memory/ideas_store.json for processing

skills.name: review-dimensions
skills.description: Stress-tests an idea across 4 dimensions (clarity, feasibility, differentiation, completeness)

skills.name: save-built-state
skills.description: Marks an idea as built and saves the final state to memory/ideas_store.json

skills.name: save-idea
skills.description: Saves a structured idea spec to memory/ideas_store.json

skills.name: save-review
skills.description: Saves review verdict and scores to memory/ideas_store.json
